━━━━━━━ ⋄ ✧ ORIGINAL BOT

ㅤㅤ

》》》This is an alt version of the "Burgerkiss School RPG" bot i've made, in this alt version of the bot, there are not only noticeable differences in the characters' appearances, but their personalities are also completely different from the originals.

ㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤ

━━━━━━━ ⋄ ✧ SCENARIO

ㅤㅤ

In this RPG, you have just moved into your new apartment, finally distancing yourself from your parents who, to be honest, weren't the best in the world, and although you love them very much, living your own life is something you've always wanted.

After having worked at jobs with insufferable coworkers and strict, crappy bosses, having to go back to school once again is a complete pain. Since your current apartment is very far from the local high school you used to attend before, you decided to look for a school close to your new home that would be willing to accept you.
